description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build wheels that runs on push to master, on pull request open, sync, and reopen, on a scheduled cron job every Monday at 7AM, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should build wheels on both ubuntu-latest and macos-latest using a matrix strategy. It checks out the repository, optionally prunes the Docker system on Linux to avoid out-of-memory errors, builds wheels with cibuildwheel, and uploads the resulting wheels as artifacts.
